description: Update intervention category labels, add Rappel category, expand provider_category enum with richer types

userStories.title: DB Migration — category labels + rappel + provider enum
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a single migration that: (1) updates intervention_type_categories labels, (2) adds rappel category + 6 types, (3) expands provider_category enum with 5 new values
acceptanceCriteria: intervention_type_categories labels updated: bien→Interventions, bail→Gestion locative, locataire→Demandes
New category 'rappel' with label 'Rappels' and sort_order 4
6 rappel types inserted with correct category_id
provider_category enum expanded with: artisan, services, energie, administration, juridique
Migration applies cleanly with supabase db push --linked

userStories.title: Regenerate types + intervention-type-combobox rappel support
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want to see the Rappels category in the intervention type selector with its own color
acceptanceCriteria: database.types.ts regenerated with new enum values
CategoryCode type includes 'rappel'
CATEGORY_COLORS and CATEGORY_TEXT_COLORS include rappel entry
categoryFilter JSDoc updated to include rappel
Typecheck passes (npm run lint)

userStories.title: Provider category constants — labels + icons
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a centralized provider category config with labels and icons for all 11 values
acceptanceCriteria: PROVIDER_CATEGORIES in contact-details/constants.ts expanded to all 11 values with labels
New PROVIDER_CATEGORY_ICONS mapping (value → Lucide icon name) exported
getProviderCategoryLabel works for all new values
Typecheck passes (npm run lint)
userStories.notes: 11 categories with Lucide icons. getProviderCategoryIcon() helper exported.

userStories.title: Contact creation form — provider_category selector
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, when creating a prestataire contact, I want to select from the full list of provider categories with icons
acceptanceCriteria: Contact creation wizard shows all 11 provider categories when role=prestataire
Each option displays icon + label
Selected category saved correctly to DB
Typecheck passes (npm run lint)
userStories.notes: New selector in step-1-type.tsx. providerCategory flows through ContactFormData → payload → API. Service uses explicit value with fallback to mapping.

userStories.title: Contact table + detail — display provider category badge with icon
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want to see the provider category as a badge with icon in the contact list and detail view
acceptanceCriteria: Contact info card displays provider_category badge with icon
Contact table config shows provider_category column with icon+label
All 11 categories display correctly
Typecheck passes (npm run lint)
userStories.notes: Badge with icon in contact-info-card.tsx + new 'Catégorie' column in contacts table.
